name: map-geojson
title: Map GeoJSON
description: GeoJSON fill + outline layers for the astro-shad Map — choropleths, districts, delivery zones; pairs with the blank basemap. Theme-aware monochrome paint defaults, hover feature-state via promoteId (hover paint merged as case expressions), click/hover CustomEvents with feature payloads. Re-adds itself on map:style-load so it survives theme-driven basemap swaps.
